prompt:
Create a cinematic travel photography scene inspired by the rice fields of Bali. A young man is standing alone in the middle of lush green rice fields surrounded by tropical palm trees and dense jungle landscape under a cloudy moody sky.
The character should wear a light beige short sleeve linen shirt and cream shorts while holding a camera casually in one hand. He is standing naturally in the center of the frame looking sideways, creating a calm wanderlust atmosphere.
Add cinematic typography across the image: “RICE FIELDS OF BALI” with “RICE FIELDS” in clean white font and “OF BALI” in bold red font.
Style should look like premium travel magazine photography mixed with cinematic storytelling. Use soft natural lighting, muted greens, atmospheric clouds, realistic textures, shallow haze, tropical aesthetic, moody travel vibes, ultra realistic DSLR quality, wide angle composition, minimalist framing, and professional color grading.
Aspect ratio 4:5, photorealistic, ultra detailed, cinematic travel poster aesthetic.
